heading: Sylvania Waters vs Tabbimoble — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sylvania Waters, New South Wales and Tabbimoble, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tabbimoble has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Sylvania Waters (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sylvania Waters or Tabbimoble safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sylvania Waters has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Tabbimoble scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sylvania Waters scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Tabbimoble scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sylvania Waters or Tabbimoble?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tabbimoble has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
